name: janagana
description: Jana Gana: membership, events, volunteer, and club management platform

scripts.dev: cd apps/web && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run dev
scripts.start: cd apps/web && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run start
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/web && npx prisma migrate dev
